EXTRAORDINARY__ [Pari ii_Srw < 0)1 (3T) fvng ytj Tfawrii, ^sr tr Wi qr <r i ’ ’ (ii) (3) 3qfWr arq^Tfr^ fqq wwt, Hrtrif :— “ (3^) iW at fern 4' tri fq^?T wfqce yfr tfr iWf rtrfRqr AmiNT riq qgjRfr 11 ’' i [ViTT. 9(9)97- rft.qf.ritj siR.qt. fri?rr, ri^ff qfqq RTc idiquf :—HyT fm qiAR.fq. 729(OT), mitTA 29 fricIWR, '¡994 fRTT TtARfritt qft t 3TT :— (i) TiT.RR.fT. 453(3?). 7iTfc?r 29 qf 1995 (it) Tn.RR.fr. 820(3?), RRb3 28 1995 (in) TiT.RR.fr. 459(33), T.TCf© 8 STR^TC, 1996 (tv ) T1T.ESI.fT. 597(37). cirfhsr 20 3Ff«i, 1999 3TCT riqTAR? fttfo At I • MINISTRY OF INFORMATION ANO BROADCASTING NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 8th September 2000 G.S.R. 710(E).—In exercise of die powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 22 ol’the Cable Television Ns.works (Regulation) Act, 1995 (7 of 1995), the Central Government hereby rnnkcs the following rules further io amend Cable Television Networks Rules, 1994, namely '— 1. (1) These rules may be called die Cable Television Networks (AmendmentJ Rules, 2000 (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette 2. In the Cable Television Networks Rules, 1994,— (a) di rule 6,— (i) m sub-rule (I), after clause (n), the following clause shall be inserted, namely :— Io) is not suitable for unrestricted public exhibition. Explanation—Tor die purpose of tliis clause, the expression ‘unresi noted public exhibition” shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in the Cinsmatogiaph Act, 1952 (3 7 of 952)’; ' fir. for suli rule (3), the following sub-ruie shall be substituted, namely —. “(3) No cable operator shail carry or include in his cable service any progiamirie in respect of which copyright subsists under the Copyright Act, 1972 (14 of 1972) unless he has been granted a licence by owners of copyright under that AG in respect of such programme ”, (b) m rule 7,—- (1) in sub-rule (2), aftei clause (vn), the following ciause shall be inserted, namely :--- "(viti) promotes directly or indirectly production, sale or consumption of— ( A) cigarettes, tobacco products, wine, alcohol, liquor or other intoxicants; (B) infant milk substitutes, feeding bottle or infant foods ", (n) after sub-rule (3), the following sub-rule shall be inserted, namely — “(3 A)No advertisement shall contain references which hurt religious sentiments [F No 9/9/97-PBC] R C MISHRA, Jt Secy. Foot note.—The principal rules were published vide GSR 729(E). dated the 29th September, 1994 and subsequently amended vide— (i) GSR 453(E), dated the 29th May, 1995, (n) GSR 820(E), dated the 28th December, 1995, (nt) GSR 459(E). dated the 8th Octobct. 1996. and (i\) GSR 597(E). dated the 20th August. 1999 Pi micd hv the Manage«.
